notes.anchor: I reached Tarentum on the 18th of May
notes.note: The Latin dates the arrival to the fifteenth day before the Kalends of June (a. d. xv Kal. Iunias), reckoned inclusively as 18 May 51 BC.

notes.anchor: I press you about Caesar's debt --- leave the business settled
notes.note: Cicero had lent money to Caesar (or borrowed against him) and wants the account closed before leaving for his province; he repeatedly urges Atticus to wind up this obligation while Caesar is solvent and well-disposed.
